annotation_target.structure: Fourth phrase antecedent — meditative repetition continues, each phrase a fresh thought
teaching_goals: embrace the hypnotic repetition — same approach as all previous phrases
each phrase feels like hearing the meditation again for the first time
style_tips: identical approach throughout — Satie's constancy is the art

teaching_notes.note: The repetition is never monotony — listen to each chord with fresh attention.
